history_log.description: Design specification approved. Implementation plan created with 8 milestones. Ready to scaffold.
M1: Project Scaffolding — Next.js 16.2.6 all deps installed, git init, pnpm dev verified.
M2: Content Pipeline — moved to active on branch feat/content-pipeline. Starting with 01-extract-text.py.
M2: Content Pipeline — 22 .doc → 22 .txt → 114 markdown surah files. Pipeline scripts (01-04) written and verified. Validation PASS (114/114).
M3: Core Components — contentLoader, ClientShell, SurahCard, SurahGrid, homepage, layout with fonts, surah reader route, Sidebar, SurahNavFooter. Build passes. Branch: feat/core-components.
M4: Special Components — QuranVerse, FontSize, ContinueReading. Building Quranic verse rendering component next.

M4: Special Components — QuranVerse.tsx (verse detection + ﴿﴾ brackets + tooltip), FontSizeControl.tsx (floating slider), ContinueReading.tsx (homepage banner), readingProgress.ts (localStorage hooks), globals.css (glass, verse-bg, animate-fade-in tokens). Build passes.
M5: Search & PWA — FlexSearch index, SearchDialog, manifest, PWA icons. Branch: feat/special-components.

M5: Search & PWA — search.ts (FlexSearch Document index), 05-build-search-index.py (7213 chunks), SearchDialog.tsx (modal with highlight), manifest.ts (web app manifest), 06-generate-icons.py (192+512 icons), ClientShell integration with search toggle. Build passes.
M6: Bookmarks & Progress — lib/bookmarks.ts, BookmarkButton.tsx, ReadingProgressBar integration. Branch: feat/search-pwa.
M6: Bookmarks & Progress — lib/bookmarks.ts (CRUD), BookmarkButton.tsx (toggle with fill icon), ReadingProgressBar.tsx (fixed top progress bar), SurahContent integration. Build passes.
M7: Juz Navigation — JuzGrid.tsx, /juz/[number] route, juz toggle in Sidebar. Branch: feat/bookmarks-progress.
M7: Juz Navigation — JuzGrid.tsx (surah grid by juz), app/juz/[number]/page.tsx (30 SSG routes), Sidebar.tsx (juz header links to /juz/{n}). Build passes — 148 routes.
M8: Polish & QA — dark mode audit, responsive audit, loading states, error boundaries, accessibility, build verification, animations.

M8: Polish & QA — All subtasks done: loading/error boundaries (6 files), accessibility (ARIA labels, skip-to-content, dialog roles), prefers-reduced-motion, animate-scale-in, RTL fixes, build verification (148 routes). Project is feature-complete.
M9: Surah Reader Visual Overhaul — The Gilded Library theme applied to reader page. Branch: feat/reader-visual-overhaul.

M9: Surah Reader Visual Overhaul — All 10 subtasks done: surah header with gold separator, Amiri Quran title, styled metadata; verse rendering with gold badges + enhanced brackets; reading pane with paper feel; card-style nav footer; glass panel font control; gradient progress bar; stagger animations; custom scrollbar; dark mode refinements. Build passes (148 routes). Branch: feat/reader-visual-overhaul.

M10: Comprehensive Visual Overhaul — The Gilded Library Complete Edition. User requested visibly premium design — addressing flat background, invisible gold, no card depth, no visual drama. 15 subtasks across all 14 component files + globals.css. Branch: feat/gilded-library-complete.

M10: Comprehensive Visual Overhaul — All 15 subtasks done. globals.css: rich warm bg gradient + paper grid + gilded-card/gold utilities. page.tsx: gold gradient hero title + ornate gold decor + premium stat pills. All components: gilded-card base, gold gradient badges with sheen hover, gold accent on Sidebar/SearchDialog/JuzGrid/ContinueReading, premium SurahContent with gold-bordered pane, SurahNavFooter with gilded-card hover, FontSizeControl/ReadingProgressBar/BookmarkButton polished. Build passes (148 routes). Project at 100%.

M11: Design Audit & Polish — Created from UI/UX critique (score 22/40). 9 subtasks addressing ban violations (gradient text, side-stripe borders), feature gaps (sidebar not rendered, no bookmarks page), and polish (gold overuse, keyboard shortcuts, error pages, SVG extraction). Backlog.
M11: Design Audit & Polish — Moved from backlog to active. Branch: fix/design-audit-polish. Starting work.

M11: Design Audit & Polish — All 9 subtasks done. Fixes: gradient text ban (solid gold color), Sidebar integrated into ClientShell (mobile overlay + fixed desktop), gold overuse dialed back (hero accent + section headers only), side-stripe borders removed (full background tint), /bookmarks route built (list/delete/navigate), keyboard shortcuts (/, ArrowRight/ArrowLeft, b), error pages hardened (العودة إلى الرئيسية link), GoldDivider component extracted (3 variants). Build passes — 149 routes.

M12: Full Offline PWA — Cache All Content for Offline Reading. Backlog. 6 subtasks: runtime caching rules, offline indicator, programmatic cache-all, search data caching, offline badge + save button, full offline test.
M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved to active. Branch: feat/offline-pwa. Starting M12_001.
M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved back to backlog (not started). Paused for M13 redesign priority.

M13: Gilded Library Redesign — Apply Design_New visual system. 15 subtasks across 3 phases: Foundation (icons, theme, layout, components), Search & Navigation, Polish. Branch: refactor/gilded-library-redesign.

M13: Gilded Library Redesign — Moved to active. Key decisions: Material Symbols icons, nav-only sidebar, dedicated /search page, #C9A84C gold. Branch: refactor/gilded-library-redesign. Starting M13_001.

M13: Gilded Library Redesign — All 15 subtasks done. globals.css: Parchment Cream palette with #C9A84C gold, new utilities (glass-header, verse-block, highlight-match). Layout: 56px fixed glass-header with inline search, nav-only sidebar with profile card, mobile bottom nav bar (4 items). Home: dark gold continue-reading banner, surah grid with gold hover accent lines. Surah cards: flat with gold circle badge, gold right accent on hover. Reading room: larger verse typography, gold border-r-4 verse blocks, verse number badges, visual break ornaments, scroll-to-top FAB, share/settings buttons. Search: dedicated /search page with filter bento grid, highlight-match results, pagination. All Lucide replaced with Material Symbols. All 15 components updated. Build passes — 150 routes. Branch: refactor/gilded-library-redesign.
M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved back to active from backlog. Branch: feat/offline-pwa. Starting M12_001.
M14: Full Project Audit — 22 subtasks across 6 phases: Content Integrity, A11y, UI/UX, Performance, Code Quality, SEO. Created from user request for systematic audit using superpowers.
M14: Full Project Audit — Moved to active. Starting M14_001: Validate all 114 surah markdown files.
M14_001: All 114 files exist, non-empty, proper encoding. P2: 097-القدر.md missing attribution line.
M14_002: Validate verse formatting (﴿ ﴾ brackets), numbering continuity across surah files.
Phase 1 (Content Integrity): M14_001-004 all done. 114 files clean. 1 P2 issue (missing attribution in 097-القدر.md).
M14_005: Starting Phase 2 — Accessibility audit. Checking ARIA, keyboard nav, focus traps.
M14_005: A11y audit complete. 1 FAIL (SearchDialog focus trap), 7 WARN files. Full report saved in session.
M14_006: Auditing color contrast — WCAG AA for gold tokens and text/background pairs.
Phase 2 (Accessibility): M14_005-008 — Audited ARIA/keyboard (1 FAIL: SearchDialog focus trap), color contrast (gold 2.16:1 + muted 2.60:1 fail WCAG AA), headings correct. Fixed all P0/P1 issues.
Phase 3 (UI/UX): M14_009-012 — Audited dark mode (toggle not persisted), color tokens (hardcoded highlight), error boundaries (juz missing error.tsx). Fixed all P0/P1 issues.
Phase 4 (Performance): M14_013-015 — Audit: SSG via generateStaticParams, loading states present, no images to optimize. No P0/P1 perf issues found.
Phase 5 (Code Quality): M14_016-019 — ESLint config broken (next lint fails), TypeScript passes clean. Fixed search.ts error handling, no console.log in prod.
Phase 6 (SEO): M14_020-022 — Solid metadata structure with OG tags, sitemap, robots.txt, manifest. Added hreflang for Arabic routes.

M14: Full Project Audit — All 22 subtasks complete (6 phases). Issues found and fixed: SearchDialog focus trap (P0), gold/muted color contrast (P0), dark mode persistence (P1), nav aria-labels (P1), OfflineBanner hardcoded colors (P1), search.ts error handling (P1), hreflang tags (P1). juz error.tsx was a false positive. ESLint config has minor issue (next lint misidentifies directory).
M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved to active. Branch: feat/offline-pwa. 6 subtasks: runtime caching, offline indicator, programmatic cache-all, search-data cache, offline badge, full offline test.

M16: Design_New Theme Token Alignment — Created with 11 subtasks across 8 phases to align all components with Design_New _1, _2, _3 HTML prototypes. Approach A (expand @theme block). Branch: refactor/design-new-theme-alignment.

M16: Design_New Theme Token Alignment — Moved to active. M15 moved to backlog (superseded by M16 concrete plan). Implementation plan saved to docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-26-design-new-theme-alignment.md.

M16: Design_New Theme Token Alignment — All 11 subtasks completed. globals.css: @theme expanded with all Design_New tokens (gilded-gold, secondary, warm-stone, warm-ash, spacing xs-xxl, typography families/sizes/line-heights) + dark overrides + utility classes. ContinueReading: dark gold banner with verse quote, juz badge, updated spacing/color tokens. SurahCard: right gold accent hover line, gilded-gold-light badge, font-headline title. Home page + SurahGrid: section header token update, grid gap, load-more button, empty state. ClientShell: header with font-headline title, gold hover rounding on action buttons, search icon on left (RTL), mobile nav secondary active color, parchment-cream bg. Sidebar: active nav border (border-r-2 border-secondary), profile card with person icon, warm-stone bg, updated nav items. SurahContent: max-w-[70ch] container, display font surah header, italic faded-ink metadata, secondary FAB with shadow-xl, pill-shaped nav buttons with shadow, gilded-gold ornament. QuranVerse: theme utility classes (font-verse, text-verse, leading-verse), gilded-gold verse border, secondary verse badges. Search page: RTL search icon on left, secondary focus border, gilded-gold filter button, gold accent result cards, secondary active pagination. Type fix: juz field added to ReadingEntry. Build passes (150 routes).

M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved to active from backlog. Branch: feat/offline-pwa. 6 subtasks: runtime caching, offline indicator, programmatic cache-all, search-data cache, offline badge, full offline test.
M17: Design_New Remaining Alignment — Moved to active. 10 subtasks for remaining prototype gaps. Branch: refactor/design-new-remaining-gaps.

M17: Design_New Remaining Alignment — All 10 subtasks completed. Header: surah/juz reading context (desktop), font-extrabold tracking-tight title, dark:border-outline-variant. QuranVerse: في ظلال الآية label before tafsir paragraphs. SurahContent: nav buttons rounded-xl with shadow-lg shadow-primary/10. Search page: h-16 input with text-[32px] icon on RTL start, الأكثر صلة sort dropdown, bookmark buttons on results, gold verse highlight box, warm-stone tags, font-title links. Sidebar: img avatar overflow-hidden wrapper pattern. Build passes (150 routes). Branch: refactor/design-new-remaining-gaps.
M15: UI/UX Aesthetic Refinements — Moved to active from backlog. Most items may be covered by M16+M17 — needs reassessment.
M15: UI/UX Aesthetic Refinements — Archived. All items covered by M16 (Design_New theme alignment) and M17 (remaining prototype gaps). Removed from backlog to completed list.
M12: Full Offline PWA — Moved to active. 6 subtasks for caching all 149 routes. Branch: refactor/design-new-remaining-gaps (create new branch before starting work).
M18 (Core Design Gaps — P0), M19 (Interaction & A11y — P1), M20 (Polish & Micro-interactions — P2) added to backlog. Derived from Design_New/ audit of 14 remaining gaps.
M18: Core Design Gaps — Activated. M12 moved to backlog. 3 P0 subtasks: floating nav pill, keyboard search navigation, real filter data.

M18 (Core Design Gaps), M19 (Interaction & A11y), M20 (Polish & Micro-interactions) — All 14 subtasks completed. M18: floating nav pill (fixed bottom pill with prev/next/bookmark/share/settings), keyboard arrow nav in search results (ArrowUp/Down + Enter), real filter data (surah names from contentLoader, juz 1-30, volumes 1-4). M19: expandable juz groups in Sidebar (accordion with chevron, aria-expanded, surah count), verse hover tooltip (title attribute on verse-badge), focus-visible:ring-accent on all interactive elements, --color-secondary-fixed-dim CSS token. M20: reading progress bar 3px, calligraphy placeholder (faded surah name in Amiri Quran), decorative auto_stories icon on home page, search input scale:focus (scale-[1.01]), GoldDivider wired into QuranVerse, active:scale on all interactive elements, SearchDialog results as rounded cards grid. Branch: feat/design-new-all-gaps. Build passes (150 routes).
M12: Full Offline PWA — Back to active. 6 subtasks: runtime caching in sw.ts, offline indicator, programmatic cache-all, search-data caching, offline badge, full offline test.
